GPU generation via transform feedback: gen.clj VS+GS mirrors seed/splat-record + layer-params + noise; upload-fields! uploads detail/noise/blur/raw/perm textures; TF+geometry-shader compaction captures survivors into a buffer consumed by shader/fs-src-buf (samplerBuffer). Verified vs CPU golden: exact count match (14046, 7945, 48167), aggregates match to float precision, visually identical. check.clj asserts the shader structure.

GPU splat generation done. ~50x faster (3ms vs ~150ms at 14k; 3.2ms at 48k). GPU is now the default path (GA_PAINTER_CPU_GEN falls back to the tested CPU reference). Bottleneck moved to the O(pixels×splats) render (separate bead).

Placement map is now luma-relative + edge-fused (wavelet/placement-map): gamma-corrected (1/2.2) luma into Haar + structure tensor, local-contrast normalization fused with global via max(), tensor edge strength (sqrt(grad2/gmax), 0.85 weight) so contours get fine splats, 512 max-side + /40 blur. Measured on coyote.jpg dark cells: frac>=lvl1 0.10 -> 0.82, frac>=lvl2 0.009 -> 0.22. Verified: coyote face/fur + gravestone text now render, street/watch improved with no regression, GPU/CPU exact-match holds (14111=14111), 57 tests + check green. Implemented by dirge from spec, reviewed + verified here.

Replaced the O(pixels×splats) fragment loop with per-splat quad rasterization + hardware blending: attribute-less draw of 6·n vertices, VS fetches the splat from the samplerBuffer via gl_VertexID, emits a 3.5σ quad (marginal-stdev AABB), FS evaluates only that gaussian, premultiplied over-blend back-to-front (reverse index = coarse-to-fine, buffer is finest-first), scissored to the image rect. A/B vs the loop renderer at 14k: visually identical. 48k coyote (the hang case): renders clean, no watchdog errors. Loop renderer kept behind GA_PAINTER_LOOP_RENDER; CPU-gen fallback path unchanged.

Controls removed instead of fixed per user decision: Palette slider + quantize branch + palette.clj deleted; Opacity slider removed (opacity stays an internal constant 0.9 — per-splat alpha from the brush-stroke work supersedes it as the visible translucency mechanism).

Zipper eliminated: prep-noise stores cos2θ/sin2θ+coherence, sample-fields + gen GS both do matched manual bilinear in double-angle space; per-seed size/tone jitter is hash01 (not a Perlin field). Verified: lcavatar edges smooth, GPU/CPU exact count match (14022=14022), 47 tests green.

Fine-level detail is now painted as brush strokes: stroke-segments (CPU) / GS chain loop (GPU) trace 6 segments along the edge-tangent orientation field, sign-continuous, Perlin-bent by Curvature, with width (−45% t^1.5) and alpha (−65% t²) tapering to the tail. Per-splat alpha rides a 3-texel record through pack-splats, all render shaders, preview. Fine seeds √6 sparser so the budget scale (stroke width) matches the old dabs — strokes organize the same paint along edges instead of fattening it. Verified: GPU/CPU exact (14083=14083 incl Σalpha), 48 tests + check green, 48k stress clean; lcavatar/coyote/street read as layered paintings.

Implemented + verified: layer-params carries per-level segs/stepf/bendf/sharp?; stroke-segments + GS chain loop consume them; wavelet/placement-map returns :sharp (fine-band Haar, minimal smoothing, same normalize+fuse) uploaded as detail-tex .g; budget accounts per-level segs with √segs spacing. GPU/CPU exact (27450=27450 incl Σalpha); 48 tests + check green; street figures/signs and coyote face/TOCK recovered while stroke look holds.

Done + verified: coyote at 100k/detail-1.0 has real eyes with pupils, legible TOCK, fur direction; street has near-readable sign numbers. GPU/CPU exact at 90310=90310 and 30210=30210. Includes the gap-bug fix: Apple GLSL mis-executed the uniform-bounded level-decode loop's last slot in the GS (base level emitted nothing at 5 levels -> truncated underpainting = gaps); constant-bound loop fixes it. 48 tests + check green.

Done + verified: lcavatar/coyote backgrounds render as smooth gradients (banding gone), edges keep traced detail; 6-level pyramid GPU/CPU exact (99847=99847 incl Σalpha — the constant-bound decode loop holds for slot 5); 48 tests + check green; golden + splat-record-spec re-pinned for the blur-leaning blend.

Fixed + verified: coyote silhouette has no halo ring, street has no edge-echo worms, flat walls smooth; lcavatar background clean. GPU/CPU exact (24119=24119 incl Σalpha), 48 tests + check green, golden re-pinned (558). Also diagnosed jolt AOT-cache staleness (size-keyed invalidation ate a same-length golden re-pin; recorded via bd remember).
